headline: Morgan Stanley launches money market fund for stablecoin reserves
summary: Investing.com -- Morgan Stanley Investment Management has launched the Stablecoin Reserves Portfolio, a government money market fund designed to meet investment requirements under the proposed GENIUS Act for stablecoin issuers.
